audit_items.proof_trace: `bid()` calls `_getAssetPrice(asset, true)` at L429, and passes `withValidation=true` into `_getAssetOutAmount` at L442, which forwards it to `_getAssetPrice(s_assetOut, withValidation)` at L798. `_getAssetPrice` with `withValidation=true` reverts on zero (`ZeroFeedData`) and stale (`StaleFeedData`) prices. The two `withValidation=false` call sites (L238, L764) are in view-only functions (`checkUpkeep`, `getAssetOutAmount`) that never execute bids.
